compliance.stopConfirmation: Mwaleka kulandiridwa mauthenga a marketing a Vergeo5. Zosintha za order zidzapitirira kutumizidwa.
compliance.startConfirmation: Mwalandiridwa zosintha za Vergeo5. Lembani STOP kuleka.

order_confirmed.body: Order yanu ya Vergeo5 {order_reference} yatsimikizidwa. Total {total}. Onani: {track_url} Lembani STOP kuleka.

payment_received.trust_narrative: K{amount} yanu ikusungidwa ndi Vergeo5 mpaka kutumiza.

order_shipped.body: Order yanu {order_reference} yatumizidwa. {tracking_info} Lembani STOP kuleka.

order_ready_pickup.body: Order yanu {order_reference} akuyenera kutengedwa. {pickup_details} Lembani STOP kuleka.

order_delivered.body: Order yanu {order_reference} adafika. Lembani ndemanga: {review_url} Lembani STOP kuleka.

vendor_new_order.body: Order yatsopano {order_reference} pa Vergeo5: {product_title} × {quantity}. Tsimikizani mu vendor app.

otp_login.body: Code yanu yolowera mu Vergeo5 ndi {otp_code}. Imatha mu mphindi 10. Musagawane code iyi.

event_cancelled.body: Event ya Vergeo5 "{event_title}" pa {event_date} yacancelled. {refund_detail} Lembani STOP kuleka.
event_cancelled.refund_pending: Kubwezeredwa kwa malipiro anu kukuchita process ndi Vergeo5.
event_cancelled.refund_none: Palibe malipiro anapezeka pa akaunti yanu pa event iyi.

event_schedule_changed.body: Zambiri za event ya Vergeo5 "{event_title}" zasinthidwa. Tsiku: {event_date}. Venue: {venue}. Onani tickets zanu mu app. Lembani STOP kuleka.

otp_login.body: Vergeo5 code: {otp_code}. Imatha mu mphindi 10. Musagawane.

review_request.body: Order yanu {order_reference} pa Vergeo5 inali bwanji? Lembani ndemanga: {review_url} Lembani STOP kuleka.

kyc_nudge.body: Kutsimikizira kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kukudikira. Malizitsani mu vendor app kuti muyambe kugulitsa.

receipt.subject: Receipt yanu ya Vergeo5 — order {order_id}
receipt.body:
Zikomo chifukwa cha malipiro anu.

Order: {order_id}

Ndalama: K{amount}

Ndalama zikusungidwa ndi Vergeo5 mpaka kutumiza.

approved.subject: Kutsimikizira kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kwavomerezedwa
approved.body:
Uthenga wabwino — kutsimikizira kwa vendor kwapititsidwa.

Tsopano mungathe kufotokoza zinthu ndi kulandira payout pa Vergeo5.

rejected.subject: Kutsimikizira kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kufuna chidwi
rejected.body:
Sitinathe kuvomereza kutsimikizira kwa vendor.

Chifukwa: {reason}

Chonde tumizanso ma documents kuchokera mu vendor app.

review_request.body: Order yanu {order_reference} ya Vergeo5 kuchokera kwa {vendor_name} inali bwanji? Lembani ndemanga: {review_url} Lembani STOP kuleka.

abandoned_cart_recovery.body: Mukadali ndi zinthu mu cart yanu ya Vergeo5. Pitilitsani kumene munalekera: {checkout_url} Lembani STOP kuleka.

kyc_nudge.body: Pempho lanu la vendor la Vergeo5 lakudikira maola 48. Malizitsani kutsimikizira kuti muyambe kugulitsa.

low_stock_alert.body: Stock yochepa pa Vergeo5: {title} ili ndi {stock_qty} zotsala (threshold {threshold}). Sinthani stock mu vendor app.

payout_failure_alert.body: Chenjezo la payout failure: {vendor_name} — {amount} (ref {lenco_reference}). Onani mu admin.
